errors.load_failed_desc: Some configuration values could not be loaded from the server. Related settings might not be saved correctly, but you can still browse and switch between other tabs.
errors.global_desc: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page. Please try again later or contact the administrator.

brand_preview.title: Live Preview
brand_preview.description: Uploaded assets update here immediately. After saving, the public brand assets will follow the current configuration. If you still see the old asset online, it is usually a cache issue.

preview_card.title: Share Card Preview
preview_card.headline: Show your brand more clearly
preview_card.description: This simulates an Open Graph / Twitter card so you can quickly judge the title, brand, and preview image composition.

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: Use a square image at 512×512 or larger. Transparent backgrounds are preferred. Avoid tiny text.

favicon.title: Favicon
favicon.description: Use 32×32, 48×48, or an `.ico` file. Keep the shape simple and recognizable.

preview.title: Preview Image
preview.description: Use 1200×630. Keep the key subject in the center safe area to reduce cropping risk.
